description: Verve Cognitive Commerce Platform — Agentic Build Manifest (Enhanced)

verve-conductor.description: Master orchestrator — routes work, enforces gates, tracks metrics and risks

verve-planner.description: Phase/task decomposition with success metrics and 70+ tasks across 4 phases

verve-flutter-builder.description: Flutter UI, shaders, Bootstrap Dialogue, Trust Ladder UI, Degraded Handshake UI, Verve+ surfaces

verve-backend-builder.description: Go Orchestrator (circuit breakers, session recovery), Python Intent Engine (Ambiguity Resolution, Trust Ladder context), Payment Router

verve-nexus-builder.description: Node.js Nexus API, Rider Pulse App, 10 Chaos Protocols, Bio-Handshake cascade, Fraud detection, Rider safety

verve-edge-builder.description: SQLite-VEC, TFLite, Trust Ladder data enforcement, 90-day pruning, corruption recovery

verve-verifier.description: Acceptance testing, success metrics validation, chaos protocol testing, failure tolerance checks

verve-cognitive-load.description: MANDATORY: File size limits (300-500 lines), context window management, structural maps, agent reading/writing rules

verve-memory.description: Build state, success metrics tracking, chaos test results, risk register, Trust Ladder progress

1.name: Invisible Intelligence
1.focus: RAG + Ambiguity Resolution, SQLite-VEC + Trust Ladder enforcement, Circuit breakers, Session recovery, Voice loop <1.2s

2.name: Visual Stage
2.focus: Impeller UI, Bootstrap Dialogue, Trust Ladder UI, Emotional State feedback, Verve+ surfaces, Adaptive Fidelity

3.name: Nexus Pilot
3.focus: Nexus API, 10 Chaos Protocols, Rider Pulse App (SOS/safety/compensation), Bio-Handshake cascade, Observability pipeline, 50 beta deliveries

4.name: Guardian & Scale
4.focus: Privacy + Trust Ladder display, Circuit breaker verification, Failure tolerance validation, Chaos simulation CI, NDPA audit, Soft launch
